# Prompt 07 — Organizational systems (`/services/organizational-systems`)

## Priority

**P07 — Org buyer path.** Dedicated Stitch page in React (`src/app/(site)/services/organizational-systems/page.tsx`, screen `4f1554bae91d4acc8fbf3f7b6660ff30`). **No** `docs/html/organizational-systems.html`.

## Deliverable

- `docs/html/organizational-systems.html` with full-page narrative + CTA; reuse evidence primitives from `site-theme.css`.

## Source documents

| Path | Use for |
| --- | --- |
| `src/app/(site)/services/organizational-systems/page.tsx` | Canonical section flow, metadata, icon-led “what’s happening” cards. |
| [`docs/html/nonprofits.html`](../../html/nonprofits.html) & [`docs/html/churches.html`](../../html/churches.html) | Institutional pain patterns; do not conflate church formation nuance with nonprofit sprint language — April 2026 notes: church direction **still open**; keep copy **honest and bounded**. |
| [`docs/html/site-templates/churches-nonprofits.html`](../../html/site-templates/churches-nonprofits.html) | Combined-audience tone reference. |
| [`docs/html/system.html`](../../html/system.html) | Link to “Movemental system” language for readers who need architecture before org-specific proof. |

## Differentiation must-have

- Explain **organizational systems** vs **movement leader platform** without demoting either audience (parity).

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Explicit **who it’s for**: denominations, nonprofits, churches, networks — as **examples**, not an exhaustive legal list.
- [ ] Routes readers to **System builds** hub and **Contact**.
- [ ] Optional `.evidence-note` for any quantitative claim.
